title: caroxylon tomentosum
intro: Caroxylon tomentosum, also known as the Coastal Saltwort or Sea Purslane, is a succulent shrub native to the Mediterranean region and other parts of the world. It is a perennial plant with thick, fleshy leaves that are rich in medicinal properties, containing compounds like flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins. The medicinal properties of Caroxylon tomentosum include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its health benefits include reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and providing relief from anxiety and stress.
